text.title: A/B Testing Basics Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: pre-registration for /pricing hero short-copy test.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Growth team wants to test shorter hero copy on /pricing. Baseline CTA CTR 6.2%, MDE 5% relative lift, alpha 0.05, power 0.8. Sample-size calc gives 12.4k per arm.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "test_id": "EXP-2026-031", "hypothesis": "Shortening the hero copy increases primary CTA CTR for cold pricing traffic.", "primary_metric": {"name": "cta_ctr", "baseline": 0.062}, "secondary_metrics": [{"name": "signup_cr"}, {"name": "d7_retention"}], "mde": 0.05, "sample_size": 12400, "split": {"control": 0.5, "treatment": 0.5}, "starts_at": "2026-05-06", "closes_at": "2026-05-20", "owner": "@ruslan" }

list.item: Pre-reg complete with all required fields — rule pre-registration-required.
SRM check scheduled for close — rule srm-check-on-close.
